case_title: MURPHY, BARTHOLOMEW vs. MENOTTI, COREY et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF CLIFFORD E. FRIED FILED
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MURPHY, BARTHOLOMEW AS TO DEFENDANT MENOTTI, COREY DODGE, CHRISTOPHER DOES 1 TO 20, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF MURPHY, BARTHOLOMEW
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MURPHY, BARTHOLOMEW SERVED MAR-08-2001, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MENOTTI, COREY DODGE, CHRISTOPHER
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT MENOTTI, COREY DODGE, CHRISTOPHER
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT MENOTTI, COREY DODGE, CHRISTOPHER
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT MENOTTI, COREY DODGE, CHRISTOPHER
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED.
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $29.19 FILED BY PLAINTIFF MURPHY, BARTHOLOMEW

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MENOTTI, COREY DODGE, CHRISTOPHER THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2271 FULTON STREET, APT. 4, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA
